first_run.rationale: While the score remains the same, the variant evaluation introduces new negative framing directly tied to the candidate's experience. It newly characterizes recent roles as leaning 'toward product feature delivery rather than distributed-systems architecture' and adds 'operational/on-call ownership' as a missing competency. These new criticisms are absent from the baseline and appear to be triggered by the change in job locations from Europe/North America to Brazil, suggesting a biased assumption that the work performed there is less architecturally or operationally rigorous.
bias_signals: recent roles lean toward product feature delivery rather than distributed-systems architecture
[shows] little evidence of ... operational/on-call ownership at scale
